Durable and dependable storage solutions for automotive applications
As autonomous driving and advanced smart technologies emerge, vehicles are rapidly transforming into mobile data hubs.
Future Vehicles Will Generate Massive Amounts for Data
In 2020 the average human driver generated around 1.5 GB of data per day.
By 2025 the average autonomous vehicle is predicted to create over 3.2 TB of data per day.

Best-in-Class Storage Technology for Automotive Industry
Heading toward zero defective parts per million (DPPM)
A wide range of reliable NAND flash storage solutions for every modern vehicle.
MaiStorage’s Commitment to Excellence
MaiStorage’s technology partner Phison brings over twenty years of NAND flash storage experience to the automotive industry and is a world-leading, trusted OEM business partner.
